text.title: Install Prompt, Update Flow, Vite PWA Config
text.summary: useInstallPrompt hook for deferred install prompt, explicit update notification pattern, and minimal Vite PWA plugin configuration.

rule.statement: Defer the install prompt (preventDefault on beforeinstallprompt) and show it only on a deliberate user action, not immediately on page load.
rule.rationale: Showing install prompts immediately has very low acceptance rates and annoys users who are still evaluating the app. Capture the event, show a banner after meaningful engagement.

section.title: Vite PWA Config

rule.statement: Set registerType: 'prompt' in vite-plugin-pwa to prevent automatic skipWaiting; always include a navigateFallback pointing to /offline.html.
rule.rationale: registerType: 'autoUpdate' calls skipWaiting silently, potentially breaking in-flight state. 'prompt' gives the app control over when the update activates.

section.reference: Minimal Vite PWA plugin config with NetworkFirst API caching

rule.statement: Test explicitly on Safari iOS: Background Sync and Push Notifications have limited support; storage is evicted after ~7 days of inactivity.
rule.rationale: Agents typically test only on Chromium and ship features that silently fail on iOS (the majority of mobile web traffic for many products).

antipattern.description: Registering the service worker at /app/sw.js but expecting root scope /.
antipattern.reason: SW scope is limited to the directory of the SW file; /app/sw.js cannot cache / paths. Fails silently at registration time.
